rulings.Case Title: JOHAN SKYTT VS. JOHNSON KAO et al
rulings.Rulings: COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF RENT BOARD DOCUMENTS. See Edna Valley Assn. v. San Luis Obispo County etc. Coordinating Council, (1977) 67 Cal.App.3d 444, 449-450 & Hogen v. Valley Hospital, (1983) 147 Cal.App.3d 119, 125. DEMURRERS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION, RETALIATORY EVICTION, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, AND VIOLATION OF SF ADMINISTRATIVE CODE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSES OF ACTION TIME BARRED. COURT OVERRULES DEMURRER TO BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. IN MENEFEE, ALL OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION WERE TIME BARRED BECAUSE ALL OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION WERE PREMISED UPON VIOLATION OF THE RENT ORDINANCE. HERE, PARAGRAPH 35 OF THE COMPLAINT REFERS TO BREACH OF FINANCIAL OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE LEASE. See Menefee v. Ostawari, (1991) 228 Cal.App.3d 239, 245. (PB)
